metadata.title: Anara Gelado Artesanal | From the farm to the cone
metadata.description: Artisanal ice cream made with the finest natural ingredients. Bourbon Vanilla from Madagascar, pure fruit and zero artificial additives.

hero.headline: Artisanal Ice Cream
hero.subheadline: From the farm to the cone.

story.title: The Finest Ingredients
story.subtitle: Nothing artificial. Ever.
story.p1: We use Bourbon Vanilla from Madagascar, fresh fruit with 50% to 75% pure content, real milk and cream — and absolutely zero artificial additives, colorings, or powders.
story.p2: Every flavor is handcrafted in small batches at our kitchen in Charneca de Caparica, where quality means everything.

menu.title: Our Flavors
menu.subtitle: Handcrafted. Always fresh.
menu.glutenFreeNote: All flavors are Gluten-Free except Oreo.

footer.webdesignCta: Like this site? Let's build yours.
